channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Go (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Go nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐹 larksuite/cli (8508 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: larksuite

📝 Repository: larksuite/cli

📄 Descrizione: The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool, maintained by the larksuite team — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 20+ AI Agent Skills.

⭐ Stelle: 8508

🍴 Forks: 549

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-25T07:13:30Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-23T04:41:19Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 DingTalk-Real-AI/dingtalk-workspace-cli (1600 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: DingTalk-Real-AI

📝 Repository: DingTalk-Real-AI/dingtalk-workspace-cli

📄 Descrizione: DingTalk Workspace is an officially open-sourced cross-platform CLI tool from DingTalk. It unifies DingTalk’s full suite of product capabilities into a single package, is designed for both human users and AI agent scenarios.

⭐ Stelle: 1600

🍴 Forks: 90

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

]]>

item.title: 🐹 cloudflare/artifact-fs (742 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: cloudflare

📝 Repository: cloudflare/artifact-fs

📄 Descrizione: ArtifactFS is a filesystem driver designed to mount large git repos as quickly as possible, hydrating file contents on-the-fly instead of blocking on the initial clone. It's ideal for agents, sandboxes, containers and other use-cases where startup time is critical.

⭐ Stelle: 742

🍴 Forks: 28

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: cloudflare filesystem fuse git

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-29T23:02:49Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-27T04:17:41Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 isboyjc/GoProxy (324 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: isboyjc

📝 Repository: isboyjc/GoProxy

📄 Descrizione: GoProxy 从多个公开代理源自动抓取 HTTP/SOCKS5 代理，通过严格验证（出口 IP + 位置 + 延迟）后加入智能代理池，对外提供 HTTP 和 SOCKS5 双协议代理服务。系统采用质量分级、智能补充、自动优化等机制，确保代理池始终保持高质量和稳定性。

⭐ Stelle: 324

🍴 Forks: 98

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-27T15:11:41Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-24T08:00:58Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

👤 Owner: dgr8akki

📝 Repository: dgr8akki/nano-ffmpeg

📄 Descrizione: nano-ffmpeg wraps the full power of ffmpeg in a beautiful, keyboard-driven terminal dashboard. No more googling flags. Browse your files, pick what you want to do, tweak settings with presets, and watch a live progress bar while it encodes.

item.title: 🐹 veyliss/ai-localbase (252 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: veyliss

📝 Repository: veyliss/ai-localbase

📄 Descrizione: 一个本地优先的AI知识库系统（RAG），用于把本地文档接入辅导搜索与大模型对话流程。目前支持md、txt、pdf（文本）、xlsx、cvs类型。支持mcp服务

⭐ Stelle: 252

🍴 Forks: 32

💻 Linguaggio: Go
